title: alnus februaria var. incana
intro: Alnus februaria var. incana, also known as the Incana Silver Birch, is a variety of the Silver Birch tree (Alnus incana), characterized by its distinctive grayish-brown bark and feathery foliage. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The Incana Silver Birch is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Alnus februaria var. incana can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
